tasks.label: Rebuild and restart gateway service
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && go build -o openedai-gateway ./cmd/gateway && systemctl --user restart openedai-gateway.service && systemctl --user is-active openedai-gateway.service

tasks.label: Rebuild and restart gateway service
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && gofmt -w ./cmd ./internal && go build -o openedai-gateway ./cmd/gateway && systemctl --user restart openedai-gateway.service && systemctl --user is-active openedai-gateway.service

tasks.label: Validate gateway auth behavior
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && set -a && source .env && set +a && echo 'INVALID:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/invalid.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-lan-invalid' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"qwen2.5-coder:32b","prompt":"hello"}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/completions" && cat /tmp/invalid.json && echo && echo 'VALID:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/valid.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H 'Authorization: Bearer sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"qwen2.5-coder:32b","prompt":"hello"}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/completions" && cat /tmp/valid.json

tasks.label: Build and restart gateway
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && gofmt -w ./cmd ./internal && go build -o openedai-gateway ./cmd/gateway && systemctl --user restart openedai-gateway.service && systemctl --user is-active openedai-gateway.service

tasks.label: Validate management endpoints
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && set -a && source .env && set +a && KEY='sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' && echo 'HEALTH:' && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/healthz" && echo && echo 'API_KEYS:' && curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/management/api-keys?limit=5" && echo && echo 'USAGE:' && curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/management/usage?hours=24&limit=5"

tasks.label: Check LiteLLM upstream ports
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && set -a && source .env && set +a && echo "Configured LITELLM_BASE_URL=$LITELLM_BASE_URL" && echo '--- Probe :4000' && curl -sS -m 3 -o /tmp/lit4000.out -w '%{http_code}\n' http://latitude:4000/health || true && cat /tmp/lit4000.out 2>/dev/null || true && echo && echo '--- Probe :11435' && curl -sS -m 3 -o /tmp/lit11435.out -w '%{http_code}\n' http://latitude:11435/health || true && cat /tmp/lit11435.out 2>/dev/null || true && echo && echo '--- TCP checks' && nc -z -w 2 latitude 4000 && echo '4000 open' || echo '4000 closed' && nc -z -w 2 latitude 11435 && echo '11435 open' || echo '11435 closed'

tasks.label: Restart gateway and test LiteLLM path
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && systemctl --user restart openedai-gateway.service && set -a && source .env && set +a && KEY='sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' && echo 'Gateway health:' && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/healthz" && echo && echo 'LiteLLM models (direct):' && curl -sS "http://latitude:11435/v1/models" | head -c 600 && echo && echo 'Proxy completion plain model:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/proxy_plain.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"qwen2.5-coder:32b","prompt":"Return one word: ok"}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/completions" && cat /tmp/proxy_plain.json && echo && echo 'Proxy completion ollama model:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/proxy_ollama.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"ollama/qwen2.5-coder:32b","prompt":"Return one word: ok"}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/completions" && cat /tmp/proxy_ollama.json

tasks.label: Inspect gateway service failure
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && systemctl --user status openedai-gateway.service --no-pager -l && echo '--- recent logs ---' && journalctl --user -u openedai-gateway.service -n 80 --no-pager

tasks.label: Run end-to-end proxy checks
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && set -a && source .env && set +a && KEY='sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' && for i in 1 2 3; do curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/healthz" && break || sleep 1; done && echo && echo 'Direct LiteLLM model call:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/lit_direct.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"ollama/qwen2.5-coder:32b","prompt":"Return one word: ok"}' 'http://latitude:11435/v1/completions' && cat /tmp/lit_direct.json && echo && echo 'Gateway model call:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/gw_call.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"ollama/qwen2.5-coder:32b","prompt":"Return one word: ok"}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/completions" && cat /tmp/gw_call.json && echo && echo 'Gateway usage summary:' && curl -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/management/usage?hours=24&limit=5"

tasks.label: Rebuild and validate after LiteLLM port alignment
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && gofmt -w ./cmd ./internal && go build -o openedai-gateway ./cmd/gateway && systemctl --user restart openedai-gateway.service && bash scripts/setup.sh && set -a && source .env && set +a && KEY='sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' && echo 'Health:' && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/healthz" && echo && echo 'Discovery:' && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/discovery" && echo && echo 'Proxy smoke test:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/gw_smoke.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"ollama/qwen2.5-coder:32b","prompt":"Return one word: ok"}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/completions" && cat /tmp/gw_smoke.json

tasks.label: Recheck Elasticsearch and RAG flow
Diagnose Elasticsearch protocol
Rebuild and verify secured ES settings
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && gofmt -w ./cmd ./internal && go build -o openedai-gateway ./cmd/gateway && systemctl --user restart openedai-gateway.service && bash scripts/setup.sh && set -a && source .env && set +a && KEY='sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' && echo 'Gateway health:' && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/healthz" && echo && echo 'RAG index test:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/rag_index_after_es.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"index":"gateway-rag","collection":"gateway-rag","text":"secure-es-check","metadata":{"source":"secure-check"},"vector":[0.3,0.1,0.7,0.2]}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/rag/index" && cat /tmp/rag_index_after_es.json

tasks.label: Retest RAG with ES auth fallback
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && gofmt -w ./cmd ./internal && go build -o openedai-gateway ./cmd/gateway && systemctl --user restart openedai-gateway.service && set -a && source .env && set +a && KEY='sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' && echo 'RAG index:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/rag_index_ok.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"index":"gateway-rag","collection":"gateway-rag","text":"secure-es-rag-pass","metadata":{"source":"secure-check"},"vector":[0.3,0.1,0.7,0.2]}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/rag/index" && cat /tmp/rag_index_ok.json && echo && echo 'RAG search:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/rag_search_ok.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"index":"gateway-rag","collection":"gateway-rag","query":"secure-es-rag-pass","vector":[0.3,0.1,0.7,0.2],"limit":3}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/rag/search" && cat /tmp/rag_search_ok.json

tasks.label: Check service status after restart
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && systemctl --user status openedai-gateway.service --no-pager -l && echo '---' && journalctl --user -u openedai-gateway.service -n 40 --no-pager

tasks.label: RAG test after service up
tasks.command: cd /home/sameer/Public/Shared/Work/Projects/OpenEdAI && set -a && source .env && set +a && KEY='sk-lan-b0721252abdb7b40adf60b2fe73efecb107391bcad72f4ba755120b6589f3620' && for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/healthz" >/dev/null && break || sleep 1; done && echo 'RAG index:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/rag_idx2.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"index":"gateway-rag","collection":"gateway-rag","text":"secure-es-rag-pass","metadata":{"source":"secure-check"},"vector":[0.3,0.1,0.7,0.2]}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/rag/index" && cat /tmp/rag_idx2.json && echo && echo 'RAG search:' && curl -sS -o /tmp/rag_s2.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -H "Authorization: Bearer ${KEY}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"index":"gateway-rag","collection":"gateway-rag","query":"secure-es-rag-pass","vector":[0.3,0.1,0.7,0.2],"limit":3}' "http://127.0.0.1:${GATEWAY_PORT}/v1/rag/search" && cat /tmp/rag_s2.json
